name: 直角三角形三角
subject: math
domain_name: 相似与三角 / Similarity & Trig / Similarity & Trig
curriculum_points: G-SRT.C.6 Understand that by similarity, side ratios in right triangles are properties of the angles in the triangle, leading to definitions of trigonometric ratios for acute angles.
G-SRT.C.7 Explain and use the relationship between the sine and cosine of complementary angles.
G-SRT.C.8 Use trigonometric ratios and the Pythagorean Theorem to solve right triangles in applied problems.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 角的概念：拖动点观察角度变化
GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「直角三角形三角」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：G-SRT.C.6 Understand that by similarity, side ratios in right triangles are properties of the angles in the triangle, le…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：G-SRT.C.7 Explain and use the relationship between the sine and cosine of comple… 对理解「直角三角形三角」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
